item.title: ‘Surprised’ Oscar Piastri sends reminder despite missing Austrian Grand Prix podium
item.description: The Aussie was happy ‘on a personal level’ and expects it won’t be the last time he’s in the mix.

item.title: Singer Delta Goodrem speaks out after surprising next career move following Eurovision success
item.description: Delta has opened up about her decision to pause singing to compete in her next challenge.

item.title: Paul Hogan labels Pauline Hanson a ‘pelican’ over ‘racist’ monoculture stance
item.description: The iconic Aussie star took aim at the One Nation leader after she labelled him an ‘essential’ figure of Australian monoculture.

item.title: Friends star Courteney Cox reportedly splits from Snow Patrol musician Johnny McDaid after 10 years
item.description: The pair, who first met in 2013 at a house party, have reportedly been living ‘different lives’.

item.title: Hiker stunned after realising Princess Catherine was climbing Scotland’s Ben Nevis alongside him
item.description: ‘I was so happy. It was just mental.’

item.title: How a single online thread helped a Queensland grandfather uncover the family he never knew existed
item.description: ‘I’ve got a lot to be thankful for, that it’s opened up the way it has, and put us in touch with real people.’

item.title: Sam Mitchell set to cash in with ‘significant’ pay rise with new Hawthorn contract
item.description: Fresh details have emerged on the future of the Hawthorn coach.

item.title: Simon Peter Carman: Australian man had guns seized by police before moving overseas and allegedly murdering teen in Thailand
item.description: The 45-year-old allegedly killed a teen before stuffing her body into a suitcase.

item.title: Li-ion Energy sounds alarm over new threat months after major Maddington battery facility explosion
item.description: The inferno burned for hours and smothered suburbs in toxic smoke. Now there is a new threat.

item.title: Minimum wage, tax cuts and paid parental leave: The major financial changes from July 1
item.description: The end of the financial year is set to trigger huge money shake-ups — some helping your pocket and others not so much.

item.title: Two suspects detained after five shot dead in Stade, northern Germany
item.description: The motive for the incident in Stade, close to the port city of Hamburg, was not immediately clear.

item.title: The online ancestry revolution helping Australians uncover who they really are
item.description: ‘There is so much information available out there, but it’s spread all around the world .. but you really can get taken on a journey about your ancestor.’

item.title: Six shot dead at mother-and-child shelter in northern Germany
item.description: Three people have been detained after multiple people were killed in a town in northern Germany.

item.title: Cause of death revealed for The Ring and Lilo & Stitch actor Daveigh Chase
item.description: The former child star passed away earlier this month at the age of 35.

item.title: Death toll jumps again as aftershocks rock Venezuela
item.description: The death toll from the country’s twin earthquakes has jumped to more than 1,700, as a 4.6-magnitude aftershock struck Caracas.

item.title: Ben Stokes to watch Ashes from ‘hospitality box’ after series defeat to New Zealand in farewell Test
item.description: The retiring England captain has finished his career on a sour note but insists he is ‘done’.

item.title: ‘Worst it’s been since the great depression’: Why the Australian wine industry is in peril
item.description: Crushing footage has emerged revealing the extent of the crisis in one of Australia’s most famous industries.

item.title: Drivers rush to get cheap petrol before fuel excise relief reduction as watchdog warns servos
item.description: Petrol stations have been put on notice as prices drop to lower than they’ve been since the 2021 pandemic.

item.title: Amazon sued by ACCC over Prime ad changes allegedly forcing Australians to pay extra for ad-free streaming
item.description: Australia’s consumer watchdog has accused the company of leaving the customers with no choice.

item.title: Chilling revelation as details of two other Thailand suitcase murders come to light amid Simon Carman charges
item.description: Chilling new details have emerged just days after a Perth man allegedly murdered a girl in Thailand and stuffed her body in a suitcase.

item.title: Ernst & Young staffer allegedly accesses Prime Minister Anthony Albanese’s bank account
item.description: The EY graduate has lost his job and will face court on Tuesday.

item.title: Karl Stefanovic’s ex Cassandra Thorburn in the fight for her life after rare breast cancer diagnosis
item.description: ‘To realise how rare it was, was quite scary and made me feel quite alone.’

item.title: Burns survivor Sophie Delezio announces major new career move
item.description: The Australian hero plans to use her real experience as a new mum to help other parents.

item.title: Newborn baby’s body found in portable toilet at Electric Forest Festival in Michigan, USA
item.description: A worker made the tragic discovery during routine maintenance.

item.title: Penny Wong speaks on ‘horrific’ alleged Thai murder, says DFAT assistance available to Simon Carman
item.description: The Foreign Affairs Minister has also spoken on the consular assistance open to the Australian suspect.

item.description: The future of the Brownlow medallist is a hot topic and Brisbane are now resigned to losing their veteran champ.

item.description: While some patients are gaining access to new medicines, others are still being left behind.

item.title: Essendon step up bid for AFL draft assistance as coaching panel snub gets called out
item.description: The club’s bosses have met with AFL powerbrokers and they are now ‘bordering on confident’.

item.title: US Supreme Court rejects President Donald Trump’s attempt to limit birthright citizenship
item.description: It is the third significant court loss for the US President in recent months.

item.description: The West Indies were shaken by the ‘scary’ scene as the Aussies suffered their own injury worry.

item.description: Even at 41 years old the superstar is set to spark a bidding war to tilt the power balance again.

item.description: A dream holiday turned into a nightmare when their car became hopelessly bogged in mud.

item.description: Housing Minister Clare O’Neil has defended the government’s tax reforms in a heated clash.

item.description: Volodomyr Zelensky last week announced a 40-day operation aimed at ‘compelling’ Russia to end the war.

item.description: The 30-year-old has transformed his fortunes just months after being thrown into a ‘panic’.

item.description: Both sides had agreed on a fresh round of negotiations to try to strike lasting peace.

item.description: John Farnham celebrated his 77th birthday on Wednesday, surrounded by his loving family and one very smiley grandson.

item.description: ‘You can’t keep making those mistakes or you are going to find your way out of this club pretty quickly.’

item.description: A top cop says one major punishment for the Australian’s alleged crimes may have been ‘off the table’ had he landed in Perth and been found guilty.

item.description: ‘I don’t feel like it’s the end of my life. There’s work to do. I still have my daughter, I have friends. I want to just say, your life continues.’

item.title: 'Night of horror': Russia bombards Kyiv in series of deadly attacks
item.description: Moscow has launched a massive missile and drone attack on Kyiv in what it says is revenge for strikes on Russian infrastructure.
